title: KitchenPerfected 2000W Double Hotplate / Cast Iron / Variable Heat Settings / Overheat Protection / Corrosion Resistant / Power Indicator / Non Slip Feet / Easy Clean - White - E4202WH
features: VARIABLE HEAT SETTINGS: Thermostatically controlled heat settings, providing different cooking options.

DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Featuring 2 cast iron plates, it is perfect for camping and travelling as it can be easily moved around and is made to last. Its shape and design also means it is easier to clean.

SAFETY FEATURES: Overheat protection, this device will automatically power off if it reaches too high of a temperature, to stop any accidents before they occur. This hotplate also has non-slip rubber feet, meaning it won?t slide and move as it is used, or as it is cooling down.
POWER INDICATOR: A neon power indicator is featured at the front of this hotplate, indicating that the hotplate is on and hot.
MADE TO LAST: This double hotplate is corrosion resistant, it won?t rust or corrode easily due to being cast iron.
description: The KitchenPerfected 2000W Double Hotplate has variable heat settings, giving a range of different cooking and warming options. It features 2 cast iron plates, perfect for camping and travelling, as it can be easily moved around and is made to last. Its shape and design also means it is easier to clean. The hotplates have an overheat protection, meaning it will automatically power off if it reaches too high of a temperature, to stop any accidents before they occur. Featuring non slip rubber feet, it will not slide and move as it is used or in transit/cooling down. A neon power indicator is also featured at the front of the hotplate, giving indication that the hotplate is on and hot. This hotplate is corrosion resistant, it won?t rust or corrode easily due to being a cast iron hotplate. Box Includes: 1 x KitchenPerfected 2000W Double Hotplate 1 x Instruction Manual
